original: Cable buyers and specifiers are increasingly conscious of the need for verification of the quality and compliance of the cables their projects install. Delivering over 30 different tests that cover the full breadth of our cable portfolio, the Cable Lab is uncompromising in its drive for compliance, whether for our cables or those of third-parties. All in-house experimental facilities are the guarantee for our continuous product improvement and quality control. All cable tests are undertaken with the same degree of diligence and accuracy, meaning results are both verifiable and can be relied upon.
